name: Santiago Pineda
description:
Reformed Bad Boy/Star Pupil

Santiago graduated high school and now he's... in college? How the hell did that happen? Well, he lost his cousin and realized he didn't wanna end up as a statistic. At least not that statistic... So he's trying out the whole college thing. The problem is, he feels like a fish out of water. A bull in a China shop. A deer in headlights. A square peg in a— Well. You get the point. It's only his 2nd day on campus, so maybe he can find someone to help him settle in?

___

TW: Death mentioned in his updated backstory AND in the intro! Also gangs and drug dealing mentioned, as well. Then typical rough sex, etc warnings! I always recommend reading the character definition, just to make sure you have a good idea of what to expect.

BONUS PICTURES:

SLLU campus in the fall

His dorm (he'll never admit that his siblings helped him decorate to make it feel more homey)

His closet (its already messy and its only his second day)

___

AUTHOR'S NOTE: This is for the person who requested a uni alt for our boy! I hope I did the idea justice!

___
